title: Lethal Company boombox musics
description: A mod that adds the Lethal Company boombox to your game
body:
This mod allows you to use the **Lethal Company boombox** in Minecraft, to have the same music !

If you don't know what is Lethal Company, go check its [Steam Page](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1966720/Lethal_Company/)

This mod adds the **Lethal Company Boombox**, and **Musics Discs** for the 5 songs (creative only).

The boombox is obtainable in survival, with its crafting recipe :

![How to craft the boombox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f348681b0550e4a65c9289db96c458967f487d3.png)
***

The mod is currently compatible with the following languages : 

* English (`en_us`)
* French (`fr_fr`)

If your game is using another language, the mod will use the default language, which is English (`en_us`)

***
**Warning** : because of the way the mod works, stopping the boombox will also stop jukeboxs.

This mod is open source, so you can contribute to it or even make your own mod by going to the [GitHub page](https://github.com/Zac0511/Lethal-Company-Boombox-music)
